name: geekstackflow
description: A structured AI workflow for planning, coding, reviewing, testing, refactoring, and shipping software. Karpathy-style LLM wiki with mandatory qmd search, two-file task tracking, six agent roles, seventeen starter skills, multi-tool portable (Claude Code, Codex, GitHub Copilot), multi-project workspace aware.

scripts.smoke: node init.js --help && echo '✓ init.js is parseable'

author: The Creative Geeks (Biben Nurbani Hasan) <biben.h@quartexsoftware.com>
